gist.headline: Fresh Ink
gist.blurb: The daily automated update to our README is fresh off the presses, keeping the latest news and apps front and center.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the README file to refresh the Latest News and Recent Apps sections.
gist.impact: Keeps the repository's landing page current with the latest community creations and project updates.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a newsboy or reading a freshly printed newspaper. A cute robot printing out the daily news.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny newsboy cap, reading a freshly printed pixelated newspaper. A chunky robot with a CRT monitor head acts as a printing press, rolling out paper. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.
